title: Discussion about creating subitem to another board with automation
excerpt: Can we create an item and its corresponding subitem in a different board by using automation features? Is there in any possible way to achieve this.

posts.author: Siddhant (Siddhant Deshpande)
posts.cookedHtml: Can we create an item and its corresponding subitem in a different board by using automation features? Is there in any possible way to achieve this.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Siddhant

We developed an app called subitem automations that provides robust automation capabilities to subitems. Here’s an example of how it can be applied in this case →

Screenshot 2024-11-13 at 18.53.312306×406 50.1 KB

You can find it in the monday.com marketplace in the platform or here - Subitem Automations - monday.com App Marketplace

Hope that helps!

posts.author: Siddhant (Siddhant Deshpande)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for your reply,

Do you have existing automation in monday.com itself as we don’t looking for third party application.
